    Method
    Description
    static Encoding
    Encoding.decode(RBuf r)
    Decode an Encoding field from the supplied buffer.

    Timestamp.decode(RBuf r)
    Decode a timestamp from the supplied buffer.
    static ZenohId
    ZenohId.readAfterLenNibble(int encodedLenNibble, RBuf source)
    Reconstruct a ZID from the encoded high-nibble length + the bytes that follow on the wire.
    static List<Extension>
    Extension.readAll(RBuf in)
    Read an extension chain until the Z flag on some header is clear.
